author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
When Lizzie Finally Gets to Babysit Matt 👶🍼 | Lizzie McGuire | @disneychannel
Watch a clip from Lizzie McGuire season 1 episode 8, "Misadventures in Babysitting". Lizzie's father reluctantly allows her to baby-sit Matt, although he believes she's still too young. Lizzie struggles to prove him wrong. Even with Gordo and Miranda helping, mayhem ensues.

Watch the next Lizzie McGuire throwback video here: https://youtu.be/7B6KQ6sYzdU

Available on Disney+
https://www.disneyplus.com/whats-on/entity-a5525471-bb5a-4367-b7a3-52a69dbfbad8

Watch more Lizzie McGuire videos here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6R6yXKSLYB5LEZ3LS9wy_ob5GCFs9S3

Enter the world of Lizzie McGuire who, together with her best friends Miranda and Gordo, gets into all sorts of misadventures and embarrassing situations as she makes her way through the middle school maze. Every day is a popularity contest, every class is a crisis and on top of everything else, Lizzie has to deal with her annoying little brother Matt, "queen of mean" Kate, and crush Ethan Craft! You always know what Lizzie is thinking, and if she can't quite say it, you can be sure her animated alter ego will.
